svg.title: Azure infrastructure — WhatsApp RAG Agent
svg.desc: System architecture diagram showing all Azure components: Container Apps, Container Registry, Key Vault / env secrets, storage, and all inbound/outbound call flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the WhatsApp webhook reach the Container App?')
sendPrompt('How does the Admin SPA call the Container App?')
sendPrompt('How does deploy.sh push to Azure?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the Azure Container Registry?')
sendPrompt('What secrets does the Container App use?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the Container App?')
g.text: Python 3.11 · FastAPI · Uvicorn · single revision · ingress: external HTTPS · min replicas: 1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI webhook handler do?')
sendPrompt('How does the LangChain agent work inside the container?')
sendPrompt('How does the community reporter pipeline run?')
sendPrompt('How does APScheduler run inside the Container App?')
sendPrompt('Where is the FAISS vectorstore stored in the container?')
g.text: 916 chunks · 3 PDFs · text-embedding-3-large · loaded at startup · read-only at runtime

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why are the SQLite databases on /tmp in the container?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in community_reports.db?')
sendPrompt('How is session state stored in the Container App?')
g.text: Session state store (in-process dict / optional Redis)
per-phone: language · conversation history · report_state · pending report object

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the Container App URL exposed publicly?')
g.text: Azure Container Apps ingress · auto-provisioned HTTPS endpoint
public FQDN · TLS termination · forwards to Uvicorn on port 8000

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Container App call on OpenAI?')
sendPrompt('What does the Container App call on SerpAPI?')
sendPrompt('What does the Container App call on Open-Meteo?')
sendPrompt('What does the Container App call on Google Sheets?')
sendPrompt('How does the Container App send WhatsApp messages back?')
sendPrompt('How does the scheduler read the early warning data.json?')
g.text: Job 2 (60 min) HTTP GET · district warning levels

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Docker build step do?')
sendPrompt('How does the image get pushed to ACR?')
sendPrompt('How does az containerapp update work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a new Container App revision is created?')

svg.text: Secrets injected from Container App env vars at runtime · no secrets in image
FAISS vectorstore baked into image at build time · SQLite DBs live on ephemeral /tmp
Revision labels: deployment timestamp · traffic: 100% to latest revision
Scale: 1–10 replicas · scale rule: HTTP concurrent requests
Region: East US · env: whatsapp-agent-env · runtime: Python 3.11 · FastAPI · Uvicorn

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is inbound traffic secured on the Container App?')
sendPrompt('How are outbound calls from the Container App authenticated?')
sendPrompt('How is CORS configured for the admin panel?')
sendPrompt('What happens to the SQLite data when the Container App restarts?')
g.text: SQLite DBs lost on restart / new revision
recommend Azure Files mount for prod

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is the FAISS vectorstore baked into the Docker image?')
g.text: persists across restarts · rebuild on new docs
